docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BILL WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA WEN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS WILLIAM MARQUARDT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
